_comment: Floor metrics for deterministic regression scenarios. CI fails if actual < min (or > max for drawdown). Bump values only when deliberately improving strategy math; document in PR.

scenarios.description: Weekly-confirmed ribbon regime on the fixed conftest sample_df (np.random.seed 42, 300 rows).
Weekly-confirmed ribbon regime with -35% drawdown exit gate on sample_df. Gate does not fire on this data (no deep drawdowns) so results must match the baseline.
